title: The Sickness & the Vines
bodyText:
**RESOLVED at the Koviz scale (S23).** Kena confirmed she caused it (drow-magicked myconid spores: topside-paradise visions — and per the DM Guide, deadly visions of staying below). Her deal — vines withdrawn + sickness ended for **Root removed** — was honored: daylight and life returned to Koviz.

# Reference — the stages
1. Cough, collapsing-rock dreams, 1 exhaustion. 2. + plant vomit, itching, topside hallucinations, violent outbursts, 4 exhaustion. 3. Death; plants erupt. 4. The dead rise (discovered S04).

> [!dm] Resolved ≠ finished: the vine network, the myconids, and whatever Root's dig actually broke into (the pool?) are still down there — and Kena keeps her own war going ([[kennarea]]).
